events_log.event: AI directive: Operations drift into a new rhythm

daily_event.headline: Operations drift into a new rhythm
daily_event.summary: Sol 4 opens with thin margins, nervous operators, and one narrow chance to shift the colony balance before the next weather swing.

missions.title: Secure ridge ice cores
missions.briefing: Survey drones marked a shallow ice seam outside the main habitat ring.
missions.objective: Bring back intact samples before the sun angle drops.

missions.title: Patch the thermal grid
missions.briefing: Heat loss is climbing in the outer utility corridor.
missions.objective: Repair or reinforce one weak point before the next cold cycle.

missions.title: Recover a silent beacon
missions.briefing: A relay beacon stopped broadcasting west of the colony.
missions.objective: Reach the site, recover telemetry, and mark salvageable parts.

npc_transmissions.message: Keep your reports short and your seals tighter. Conditions are changing faster than forecast.
Your telemetry is the cleanest on the planet today. Do not waste that advantage.

ai.news_summary: Sol 4 begins in Early Spring with 3 active colonies. Temperature holds near -78C, solar activity sits at 94%, and the current leaders are Marco Quinn:1529, Zoya Kade:1310, Irina Vale:1261.
